def negative_unbounded_list_accumulation_inside_long_running_function():
    rule_id = "unbounded_list_accumulation_inside_long_running_function"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "List grows unboundedly inside a long-running function or loop without a cap or periodic flush."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
